basic_details.job_title: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Accounts Assistant, Administrative Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Accounts Assistant, Project/Grants Executive, Administrative Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website rcb.res.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the RCB Recruitment 2026 for posts including Senior Accounts Assistant, Project/Grants Executive, and Administrative Assistant.

qualification.details: Senior Accounts Assistant: B.Com/BBA/CA/ICWA degree with 5 years' experience in accounts and finance in a reputed organization. Must have adequate IT skills and knowledge of Govt. Financial Rules and PFMS. Project/Grants Executive: Option 1: M.Tech/M.Sc/B.Tech in Biotechnology/Life Sciences + 3 years relevant experience OR Option 2: Any Graduate/Postgraduate degree + 5 years relevant experience in program coordination/management in govt./university/research institution. Minimum experience in coordination and program management. Excellent communication skills, MS Office. Administrative Assistant: Graduate with knowledge of computers + 5 years experience in handling correspondence, office management, file work, accounts and finance.

salary_details.details: Senior Accounts Assistant: Rs. 66,000 per month Project/Grants Executive: Rs. 60,000/- per month Administrative Assistant: Rs. 40000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Regional Centre for Biotechnology to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Regional Centre for Biotechnology recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Regional Centre for Biotechnology recruitment is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for various posts in the Regional Centre for Biotechnology recruitment. These include Senior Accounts Assistant, Project/Grants Executive, and Administrative Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 200/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 66,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Senior Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Accounts Assistant position, candidates need a B.Com/BBA/CA/ICWA degree with 5 years of experience in accounts and finance, along with IT skills and knowledge of government financial rules.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates with a graduate degree apply for the Project/Grants Executive role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with any Graduate/Postgraduate degree and 5 years of relevant experience in program coordination/management can apply for the Project/Grants Executive post. An M.Tech/M.Sc/B.Tech in Biotechnology/Life Sciences with 3 years of experience is also an option.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Government of India norms. Discretionary relaxation may also be considered.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve shortlisting of candidates by a Screening Committee. Further stages, if any, will be communicated by the organization.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Regional Centre for Biotechnology recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of the Regional Centre for Biotechnology on or before the last date. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project duration mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The initial project duration is mentioned as up to 10th February 2027. This indicates the contractual nature of the positions being advertised.
